security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' data: blob: ws: http://localhost:1420 ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Basalt is an open-source, local-first Markdown knowledge base that reads and writes the same plain-Markdown vault as Obsidian. AGPL-3.0-or-later.
